def negative_package_init_performs_metadata_version_lookup_on_import():
    rule_id = "package_init_performs_metadata_version_lookup_on_import"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag package __init__ files that do runtime metadata lookups just to expose a version."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
